posts.author: MintyPots92
posts.text: URGENT! Just got a message saying my account is locked. To unlock it, I need you to reply with your password and the 2FA code sent to your phone immediately. Please don't worry, this is just a security step! Click here to [link removed] and send details now.
posts.explanation: This post constitutes an obvious credential-harvesting scam where the author directly solicits passwords and security codes via a suspicious link, which is a clear Fraud violation requiring immediate removal.
